1.instruction:
Perform a comprehensive code review of the Jasmin SMPP dashboard, fix all remaining errors, and prepare production-ready code. This includes:
1. Review and fix all React components
2. Ensure proper error handling
3. Implement proper authentication flow
4. Add loading states
5. Optimize performance
6. Add proper documentation
7. Set up proper environment configurations
8. Implement proper logging
Deliver the final production-ready code with deployment instructions.

2.instruction: Design the system architecture for the Jasmin SMPP SMS Gateway web interface. Include components for CLI command execution, user management, dashboard interface, and SMS statistics visualization. Specify integration points with the Jasmin SMPP gateway backend.

3.instruction: Develop the Jasmin SMPP SMS Gateway web application with all CLI features integrated into the dashboard, user management, and SMS statistics tracking. Implement the solution based on the PRD and system architecture. Ensure the project can be easily deployed to GitHub.

f64b147b-117b-4b91-941d-0a629fff70c0.cmd: cd /data/chats/015rz/workspace/react_template && pnpm i && pnpm run dev
